title: P2: get_key_package DB error silently returns None data
description: relay/src/ws.rs: get_key_package DB error path uses unwrap_or(None), indistinguishable from 'key not published'. MLS admission silently fails with no log entry. Fix: match on Result, log error\!, send INTERNAL_ERROR response.
close_reason: Fixed in same session: save_key_package now sends INTERNAL_ERROR (-32603); get_key_package now matches on Result and sends INTERNAL_ERROR on DB error instead of swallowing as None.
